strengths: 6+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB—strong alignment with primary stack
Current experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators (direct match to required skill)
Demonstrated progression through senior/staff roles indicating architectural capability and technical leadership
concerns: Unexplained career gap starting Oct 2025; previous role at re:cinq lasted only 6 months despite longer tenure at prior employer
Nest.js, Vitest, Jest, and Playwright not explicitly mentioned despite being required or secondary technologies
Extensive historical use of non-primary-stack languages (DLang, Ember.js) raises questions about depth in TypeScript/React ecosystem

key_factors.factor: AI agent development and infrastructure experience
Recent career gap and short tenure pattern

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong foundational skills in the primary stack with 6+ years of full-stack experience and clear progression into architectural roles. His current focus on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly matches required skills. However, the unexplained career gap beginning Oct 2025 and brief 6-month tenure at re:cinq before that raise concerns about stability and commitment. Specific required or secondary technologies (Nest.js, Vitest, Jest, Playwright, Kotlin/Java) are absent from the resume, making it unclear whether he has hands-on expertise in these areas or primarily adjacent technologies.
